select_when: The team is either collapsing to the first workable idea or endlessly ideating without a real selection moment.
The problem is novel enough to need broad option generation but consequential enough to require disciplined narrowing afterward.
Creative exploration and critical evaluation are both necessary, but harmful when mixed at the same time.
avoid_when: Participants are switching modes so chaotically that neither ideation nor evaluation is being done well.
The problem already has a clear bounded answer and extra divergence would only delay execution.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model on deliberate alternation between idea expansion and disciplined narrowing rather than on generic creativity language.
donor_drops: No donor-only normalization was kept when the raw source already supported a cleaner bounded routing identity.
open_questions: Wave 4 remains observational only for this model until a later selective review explicitly earns higher-order treatment.

select_when.note: Select conditions compress explicit application-context guidance from the raw markdown.

avoid_when.note: Avoid conditions compress explicit dangers and anti-patterns from the raw markdown.

input_type.note: The typed input label compresses the recurring decision structure named in the raw source.

output_type.note: The typed output label compresses the intervention artifact implied by the raw source.

reasoning_types.note: Reasoning types reflect the minimal current Layer 2B vocabulary needed to preserve how the model operates.
